# Imo Babics
> Chief Growth Officer & CMO at Relai — Europe's leading MiCA-licensed Bitcoin-only self-custody app. 17 years in marketing, 8+ in Bitcoin. Specialist in Bitcoin adoption, European fintech growth, and regulated-market go-to-market strategy.

## About
Imo Babics (also Imrich Babics) is the Chief Growth Officer, CMO, and Managing Director of Relai's EU entity. Previously Head of Marketing at Bitpanda, where he scaled the platform from 100,000 to over 1 million users. Based in Vienna, Austria.

## Key topics
- Bitcoin adoption in Europe
- MiCA regulation and compliant crypto marketing
- Fintech growth and go-to-market strategy
- App growth and user acquisition
- Bitcoin as a savings product for European consumers

## Current role
- Chief Growth Officer & CMO, Relai — https://relai.app
- Managing Director, Relai EU entity

## Writing & talks
- [How MiCA Unlocked 450 Million Users](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/bitcoins-european-moment-here-how-mica-unlocked-450-million-b%C3%A1bics-bzegf/) - LinkedIn
- [Europeans Suck At Managing Their Finances. Bitcoin Fixes This.](https://bitcoinmagazine.com/culture/bitcoin-helps-european-fix-their-finances) - Bitcoin Magazine
- [8 Things I Learned in Startups](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/8-things-i-learned-from-years-startups-imrich-b%C3%A1bics-cyu2e/) - LinkedIn
- [Bitcoin Growth in Europe — A Conversation](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NBGU5HD5mzE) - YouTube / Podcast

## Projects
- [whentobuybtc.xyz](https://whentobuybtc.xyz) - Bitcoin signal tool for European savers
